text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky is training hard for the upcoming
Tenno Sho in the fall.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, a press conference is held for
the Umamusume who will run in the race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Among them is Special Week, who has always
watched Maruzensky from a distance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Finally able to challenge one another in the
greatest of arenas, Maruzensky smiles with
unconcealed joy.
